case_title: GERALD VARNES VS. SP PLUS CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS FOR TRIAL BY MAIL - PACKET LODGED IN FILE.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (WITH SUPPORTING DECLARATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARNES, GERALD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $350.00) SERVED APR-23-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SP PLUS CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT SP PLUS CORPORATION

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $325.00) SERVED APR-23-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SP PLUS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VARNES, GERALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SP PLUS CORPORATION SP PLUS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT INC. $584.00 PRINCIPAL, $325.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $909.00, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
